---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the proposed feature.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is this important?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution in detail.

### User Stories
- As a [type of user], I want [some goal] so that [some reason]
- As a [type of user], I want [some goal] so that [some reason]

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Implementation Plan
If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented:

### Technical Approach
- Architecture changes needed
- New dependencies required
- Database schema changes
- API endpoints to add/modify

### Phase Assignment
Which phase(s) in the roadmap would this fit into?

## Design Considerations
- UI/UX implications
- Accessibility requirements
- Mobile responsiveness
- Internationalization support

## Security Considerations
- Authentication/authorization requirements
- Data privacy implications
- Security testing needs

## Performance Considerations
- Expected impact on load times
- Resource usage implications
- Scalability considerations

## Testing Strategy
- Unit tests needed
- Integration tests needed
- E2E tests needed
- Performance tests needed

## Documentation Needs
- User documentation
- API documentation
- Developer documentation

## Related Issues/PRs
Link to any related issues or pull requests.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks development)
- [ ] High (important for user experience)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future enhancement)

## Timeline
When would you like this feature implemented?
